text:

> +CONFIGURE_ARGS=	--enable-shared --with-bzlib=no --with-dps=no --with-fpx=no \
> +		--with-perl=${PERL5}

About LZW I wrote in previous messages, but here please add 
--enable-16bit-pixel too.
